arts.ttl: I dream of becoming Manchester United's number nine - and now I have the perfect mentor
arts.sum: Joe Hugill has ambitions of leading Man United's attack in the future - and he has suddenly found himself working with a man who knows what it takes.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: New striker targets eyed as Ruben Amorim addresses Jim Ratcliffe plan
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has spoken out about Sir Jim Ratcliffe's latest cost-cutting plans and delivered a team news update ahead of his side's trip to Tottenham

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Micky van de Ven's special training and Cristian Romero update
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou had positive Tottenham injury news for a change and plenty of clarity on Micky van de Ven and Cristian Romero's injury recoveries at his press conference on Friday. Tottenham supporters have been looking for updates on Micky van de Ven and Cristian Romero and they got plenty of detail from the Australian.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs 'identify £25m Son Heung-min successor' as three-team battle emerges
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly one of three clubs eyeing a deal for Feyenoord's Igor Paixao, who recently gave Kyle Walker a torrid time in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: A year on from his record scoring streak: What's happened to Hojlund?
arts.sum: A year ago, Rasmus Hojlund became the youngest-ever player to score in six successive Premier League games.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou says Tottenham CANNOT give up in the Premier League and focus solely on Europe despite his side languishing in the bottom half of the table
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has warned his Tottenham players not to fall into the trap of thinking the Europa League is all that matters, and is determined to climb out of the Premier League doldrums.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou hopes Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven are back for Europe
arts.sum: Micky van de Ven returned against Elfsborg on January 30, but a cautious approach has been taken since.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou senses 'opportunity' to save Tottenham season as he lays down Europa League challenge
arts.sum: Spurs boss confident his side can produce winning run to move up the table

arts.ttl: Tottenham face EPL competition for 24-year-old with 22 G/A this season
arts.sum: After what’s turning out to be a dismal season for Tottenham, landing Feyenoord’s highly-rated Igor Paixao in the summer would be a real coup for Ange Postecoglou and the North Londoners. As The Sun report, however, they face stiff competition to land the player from Premier League rivals, Newcastle and Bournemouth. Tottenham want Igor Paixao […] The post Tottenham face EPL competition for 24-year-old with 22 G/A this season appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Kulusevski set to benefit from Maddison Tottenham injury return vs Man United
arts.sum: "Some of the lads who have been out for quite a while look like they’re in a good place now, Vic is probably the one who has come back ahead of schedule," he told Tottenham's official website . As Postecoglou was able to work with his squad for a full week without interruption at Hotspur Way, that was actually mostly rest days after damaging defeats in the FA Cup and Carabao Cup, two long-awaited defensive returns are expected.
